---
title: "Interaktywny wykres w xaringan"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: default
    self_contained: yes
runtime: shiny
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)
```

```{r}
selectInput("kod_plot", "Wybierz kod wykresu:", choices = c(
  "ggplot(mtcars, aes(mpg, wt)) + geom_point()",
  "ggplot(mtcars, aes(factor(cyl), mpg)) + geom_boxplot()",
  "ggplot(mtcars, aes(hp)) + geom_histogram(bins = 10)"
))


```

```{r}

renderText({
  paste0("```r\n", input$kod_plot, "\n```")
})

```



```{r, echo = FALSE}

renderPlot({
  eval(parse(text = input$kod_plot))
})

```
